corrections.description: Missing the beginning of 'The Present' poem - need to add the title and first stanza
corrections.text:
THE PRESENT

If I gave my love a present
of a tinkling silver bell,
Could it chime the hour I met him
that my heart remembers well?

If I gave my love a present,
a chain of gilded gold,
Could it bind and entwine him
better than my love could hold?

If I gave my love a
